nodes.name: 苏丹
nodes.summary: 苏丹是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Sand partridge、Scaly spurfowl等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-headed buffalo weaver
nodes.summary: White-headed buffalo weaver（White-headed buffalo weaver，学名 Dinemellia dinemelli），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: boehmiSerengeti National Park, Tanzania | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | parent_authority = Reichenbach, 1863 | taxon = Dinemellia dinemelli | authority = (Rüppell, 1845) }} The white-headed buffalo weaver or white-faced buffalo-weaver (Dinemellia dinemelli) is a species of passerine bird in the family Ploceidae native to East Africa. The buffalo part of its name derives from its habit of following the African buffalo, feeding on disturbed insects. Two subspecies are recognized

The buffalo part of its name derives from its habit of following the African buffalo, feeding on disturbed insects. Two subspecies are recognized

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-headed buffalo weaver is native to the African countries of Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, Sudan, Tanzania, and Uganda. It prefers habitats such as savanna, and shrublands, but especially dry brush and acacia thickets
